name: media-editor-01
title: Media Editor 01
author: ilinxa
description: Black-box media capture + edit surface (photo / video / text) with four controllable capability dials (enabledModes, enabledTools, mediaSources, aspect). Extracted from story-composer-01 v0.1.5 for re-use by content-composer / chat / CMS hero editors. Konva-based multi-layer canvas (image / drawing / stickers / text / ui-transformer), 6 edit tools (Text / Draw / Stickers with 36 built-in emoji + extensible / Filters with 10 Instagram-style presets / Adjust / opt-in Crop), pan + pinch-zoom, initialSource intake (URL / Blob / File) for CMS re-edit, polymorphic export() with format dispatch (jpeg / png / webp) + onProgress, video-export perf shortcut, multi-instance dev-warn guard, inline / dialog / auto presentation.
